g.text: Please use CSS style instead of skinparam ParticipantPadding
Must have valid cross-match status before being considered
Units sorted by closest expiry date after exact match
[TLS encrypted] Post-state: Post1 - Only valid cross-matched units considered
[TLS encrypted] Post-state: Post2 - Units prioritized by closest expiry date
[TLS encrypted] Cross-match validation failed - unit not considered
[TLS encrypted] Inventory data unavailable - operation cannot proceed
[TLS encrypted] Actor lacks required permissions - operation denied
State transition: Pre1 -> Post1 (cross-match status validated)
State transition: Pre2 -> Post2 (units sorted by closest expiry date)
